pinyin: nǐ hǎo!
english: Hello!
usage_context: General greeting for any occasion

pinyin: zǎoshang hǎo!
english: Good morning!
usage_context: Morning greeting

pinyin: zàijiàn!
english: Goodbye!
usage_context: Farewell at any time of day

pinyin: nǐ jiào shénme míngzì?
english: What is your name?
usage_context: When meeting someone for the first time

pinyin: nǐ hǎo ma?
english: How are you?
usage_context: Casual greeting to ask how someone is doing

pinyin: zhège duōshao qián?
english: How much is this?
usage_context: Asking the price of an item in a store

pinyin: wǒ yào mǎi zhège.
english: I want to buy this.
usage_context: Expressing intent to purchase an item

pinyin: wǒ yào hē shuǐ.
english: I want to drink water.
usage_context: Requesting water at a restaurant or home

pinyin: hǎochī!
english: Delicious!
usage_context: Expressing that food is tasty

pinyin: zhè shì nǎlǐ?
english: Where is this place?
usage_context: When lost or unfamiliar with location

pinyin: wǒ bù zhīdào.
english: I don't know.
usage_context: When you don't have information

pinyin: zhè shì wǒ māma.
english: This is my mother.
usage_context: Introducing a family member

pinyin: wǒ yǒu yī gè gēge.
english: I have an older brother.
usage_context: Describing family members

pinyin: wǒ shì xuésheng.
english: I am a student.
usage_context: Introducing yourself or your role

pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān xuéxí hànyǔ.
english: I like studying Chinese.
usage_context: Expressing interest in learning Chinese

pinyin: jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo.
english: The weather is very good today.
usage_context: Commenting on nice weather

pinyin: wàimiàn hěn lěng.
english: It's very cold outside.
usage_context: Warning someone about cold weather

pinyin: xièxie!
english: Thank you!
usage_context: Expressing gratitude

pinyin: bù kèqi!
english: You're welcome!
usage_context: Responding to someone's thanks

pinyin: duìbuqǐ!
english: Sorry!
usage_context: Apologizing for a mistake

pinyin: hǎo jiǔ bù jiàn!
english: Long time no see!
usage_context: Greeting someone you haven't seen in a while

pinyin: nǐ zuìjìn zěnmeyàng?
english: How have you been lately?
usage_context: Asking about someone's recent life

pinyin: yǒu méiyǒu gèng piányí de?
english: Do you have anything cheaper?
usage_context: Asking for a lower-priced option

pinyin: wǒ kěyǐ shuā kǎ ma?
english: Can I pay by card?
usage_context: Asking if credit/debit card payment is accepted

pinyin: qǐng gěi wǒ kàn yīxià càidān.
english: Please show me the menu.
usage_context: Requesting the menu at a restaurant

pinyin: wǒ duì huāshēng guòmǐn.
english: I am allergic to peanuts.
usage_context: Informing others about a food allergy

pinyin: cóng zhèlǐ zěnme zǒu?
english: How do I get there from here?
usage_context: Asking for directions

pinyin: zuò dìtiě qù yào duō cháng shíjiān?
english: How long does it take by subway?
usage_context: Asking about travel time by subway

pinyin: wǒ dùzi bù shūfu.
english: My stomach doesn't feel well.
usage_context: Expressing stomach discomfort

pinyin: wǒ xūyào kàn yīshēng.
english: I need to see a doctor.
usage_context: Expressing the need for medical attention

pinyin: nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
english: How many people are in your family?
usage_context: Asking about family size

pinyin: nǐ zuò shénme gōngzuò?
english: What kind of work do you do?
usage_context: Asking about someone's job

pinyin: wǒ yào qù jīchǎng, zuò shénme chē?
english: I need to go to the airport, what vehicle should I take?
usage_context: Asking about transportation to the airport

pinyin: qǐng bāng wǒ jiào yī liàng chūzū chē.
english: Please help me call a taxi.
usage_context: Asking someone to call a taxi for you

pinyin: zhè dào tí wǒ bù huì zuò.
english: I don't know how to do this problem.
usage_context: Asking for help with a homework problem

pinyin: jīntiān huì xià yǔ ma?
english: Will it rain today?
usage_context: Asking about the chance of rain

pinyin: qǐng duō guānzhào!
english: Please take care of me! / I'm in your care.
usage_context: Said when starting a new relationship or job

pinyin: wǒ zhǐ shì suíbiàn kànkàn.
english: I'm just browsing.
usage_context: Telling a shop assistant you're just looking

pinyin: jiézhàng, xièxie!
english: Check, please! Thank you.
usage_context: Asking for the bill at a restaurant

pinyin: nǐ yào duō xiūxi.
english: You should rest more.
usage_context: Giving advice to someone who is unwell

pinyin: xìnghuì xìnghuì!
english: Pleased to meet you! (formal)
usage_context: Formal expression when meeting someone new

pinyin: qǐngwèn, nín guì xìng?
english: May I ask your honorable surname?
usage_context: Formal way to ask someone's surname

pinyin: néng bù néng zài piányí yīdiǎnr?
english: Can it be a little cheaper?
usage_context: Bargaining or negotiating a price

chinese: 我对海鲜过敏，请不要放。
pinyin: wǒ duì hǎixiān guòmǐn, qǐng bùyào fàng.
english: I'm allergic to seafood, please don't add it.
usage_context: Telling a restaurant not to include seafood

pinyin: qǐngwèn fùjìn yǒu yínháng ma?
english: Excuse me, is there a bank nearby?
usage_context: Asking for a nearby service or facility

pinyin: wǎng qián zǒu, rán hòu zuǒ zhuǎn.
english: Go straight, then turn left.
usage_context: Giving directions

pinyin: wǒ gǎnmào le, tóu hěn téng.
english: I have a cold, my head hurts a lot.
usage_context: Describing cold symptoms

pinyin: qǐng gěi wǒ kāi yī zhāng chǔfāng.
english: Please write me a prescription.
usage_context: Requesting a prescription from a doctor

chinese: 请问这班火车几点出发？
pinyin: qǐngwèn zhè bān huǒchē jǐ diǎn chūfā?
english: Excuse me, when does this train depart?
usage_context: Asking about train departure time

pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yùdìng yī jiān dānrén fáng.
english: I would like to book a single room.
usage_context: Making a hotel reservation

pinyin: nǐ shì nǎlǐ rén?
english: Where are you from?
usage_context: Asking about someone's hometown or origin

pinyin: zhè cì kǎoshì nǐ kǎo le jǐ fēn?
english: What score did you get on this exam?
usage_context: Asking about exam results

chinese: 这个报告什么时候要交？
pinyin: zhège bàogào shénme shíhou yào jiāo?
english: When is this report due?
usage_context: Asking about a report deadline

chinese: 天气预报说明天有大风。
pinyin: tiānqì yùbào shuō míngtiān yǒu dàfēng.
english: The weather forecast says there will be strong wind tomorrow.
usage_context: Sharing weather forecast information

pinyin: gōngxǐ gōngxǐ!
english: Congratulations!
usage_context: Congratulating someone on an achievement or happy event

pinyin: kěyǐ dǎbāo ma?
english: Can I get this to go? / Can I have a doggy bag?
usage_context: Asking to take leftover food home

chinese: 这件衣服有大一号的吗？
pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfu yǒu dà yī hào de ma?
english: Do you have this clothing in one size larger?
usage_context: Asking for a different size at a clothing store

pinyin: qǐngwèn xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ?
english: Excuse me, where is the restroom?
usage_context: Asking for the location of a restroom

pinyin: wǒmen gǎitiān zài tán ba.
english: Let's talk about it another day.
usage_context: Postponing a conversation to another time

pinyin: nǐ néng bāng wǒ jiěshì yīxià ma?
english: Can you help me explain this?
usage_context: Asking for clarification or explanation

chinese: 请问，您方便接受一个小时的采访吗？
pinyin: qǐngwèn, nín fāngbiàn jiēshòu yī gè xiǎoshí de cǎifǎng ma?
english: May I ask, would it be convenient for you to accept a one-hour interview?
usage_context: Requesting a formal interview

pinyin: wǒmen néng fǒu dáchéng gòngshí?
english: Can we reach a consensus?
usage_context: Suggesting agreement in a meeting or negotiation

pinyin: zhè shì zuì xīn kuǎnshì ma?
english: Is this the latest style?
usage_context: Asking about the newest product model or style

pinyin: zhè dào cài yǒu shénme tèsè?
english: What's special about this dish?
usage_context: Asking about the characteristics of a menu item

pinyin: zhè zhǒng yào yǒu fùzuòyòng ma?
english: Does this medicine have side effects?
usage_context: Asking a doctor or pharmacist about side effects

chinese: 我的护照丢了，应该怎么办？
pinyin: wǒ de hùzhào diū le, yīnggāi zěnme bàn?
english: I lost my passport, what should I do?
usage_context: Reporting a lost passport to authorities

chinese: 请问，这里可以兑换外币吗？
pinyin: qǐngwèn, zhèlǐ kěyǐ duìhuàn wàibì ma?
english: Excuse me, can I exchange foreign currency here?
usage_context: Asking about currency exchange services

chinese: 这篇论文的主题是什么？
pinyin: zhè piān lùnwén de zhǔtí shì shénme?
english: What is the topic of this paper?
usage_context: Asking about the subject of an academic paper

pinyin: nín fùmǔ shēntǐ hái hǎo ma?
english: Are your parents in good health?
usage_context: Politely asking about someone's parents' health

chinese: 这场台风影响到我们这里了。
pinyin: zhè chǎng táifēng yǐngxiǎng dào wǒmen zhèlǐ le.
english: This typhoon has affected our area.
usage_context: Describing weather-related impact

chinese: 这条路堵车很厉害，建议走另一条。
pinyin: zhè tiáo lù dǔchē hěn lìhài, jiànyì zǒu lìng yī tiáo.
english: Traffic is very bad on this road, I suggest taking another route.
usage_context: Giving route advice based on traffic

chinese: 这个项目的预算是多少？
pinyin: zhège xiàngmù de yùsuàn shì duōshao?
english: What is the budget for this project?
usage_context: Asking about a project's financial budget

pinyin: nín xīnkǔ le!
english: You've worked hard! Thank you for your efforts.
usage_context: Showing appreciation for someone's hard work

chinese: 这个产品有质量保证吗？
pinyin: zhège chǎnpǐn yǒu zhìliàng bǎozhèng ma?
english: Does this product come with a quality guarantee?
usage_context: Asking about product warranty

pinyin: wǒmen fēnkāi fù zhàng ba.
english: Let's split the bill.
usage_context: Suggesting to pay separately at a restaurant

pinyin: wǒ xūyào yùyuē guàhào.
english: I need to make an appointment (at the hospital).
usage_context: Registering for a hospital appointment

chinese: 请问这门课有哪些选修内容？
pinyin: qǐngwèn zhè mén kè yǒu nǎxiē xuǎnxiū nèiróng?
english: May I ask what elective content this course has?
usage_context: Asking about elective course options

chinese: 这里的风景真的让人叹为观止。
pinyin: zhèlǐ de fēngjǐng zhēn de ràng rén tàn wéi guān zhǐ.
english: The scenery here is truly breathtaking.
usage_context: Expressing awe at a beautiful landscape

chinese: 孩子的教育是最重要的投资。
pinyin: háizi de jiàoyù shì zuì zhòngyào de tóuzī.
english: A child's education is the most important investment.
usage_context: Discussing the value of education in family

chinese: 我们需要尽快解决这个问题。
pinyin: wǒmen xūyào jǐn kuài jiějué zhège wèntí.
english: We need to solve this problem as soon as possible.
usage_context: Expressing urgency in solving a work problem

chinese: 在我看来，这个方案还有待商榷。
pinyin: zài wǒ kàn lái, zhège fāng'àn hái yǒu dài shāngquè.
english: In my view, this proposal is still open to discussion.
usage_context: Diplomatically expressing reservations about a plan

pinyin: jiǔ yǎng dà míng!
english: I've long admired your reputation!
usage_context: Very formal expression upon meeting a respected person

chinese: 请问您对这件事有何高见？
pinyin: qǐngwèn nín duì zhè jiàn shì yǒu hé gāojiàn?
english: May I ask what your distinguished opinion is on this matter?
usage_context: Formally and respectfully requesting someone's opinion

chinese: 这篇文章的论点缺乏充分的实证支持。
pinyin: zhè piān wénzhāng de lùndiǎn quēfá chōngfèn de shízhèng zhīchí.
english: The arguments in this article lack sufficient empirical support.
usage_context: Academic critique of an article's argument quality

chinese: 当地的风土人情令我深深着迷。
pinyin: dāngdì de fēngtǔ rénqíng lìng wǒ shēnshēn zháomí.
english: The local customs and human warmth deeply fascinated me.
usage_context: Expressing fascination with local culture while traveling

chinese: 长期的精神压力会对身心健康造成严重损害。
pinyin: chángqī de jīngshén yālì huì duì shēnxīn jiànkāng zàochéng yánzhòng sǔnhài.
english: Long-term mental stress can cause serious harm to physical and mental health.
usage_context: Discussing the health effects of chronic stress

chinese: 代际之间的沟通需要双方的理解与包容。
pinyin: dàijì zhī jiān de gōutōng xūyào shuāngfāng de lǐjiě yǔ bāoróng.
english: Communication between generations requires mutual understanding and tolerance.
usage_context: Discussing intergenerational family dynamics

chinese: 这项政策的实施将面临诸多挑战。
pinyin: zhè xiàng zhèngcè de shíshī jiāng miànlín zhūduō tiǎozhàn.
english: The implementation of this policy will face many challenges.
usage_context: Discussing challenges in policy implementation

chinese: 这道菜的烹饪工艺相当复杂，需要精心准备。
pinyin: zhè dào cài de pēngrèn gōngyì xiāngdāng fùzá, xūyào jīngxīn zhǔnbèi.
english: The cooking technique for this dish is quite complex and requires careful preparation.
usage_context: Describing a sophisticated culinary technique

chinese: 极端气候现象的频繁出现与全球变暖密切相关。
pinyin: jíduān qìhòu xiànxiàng de pínfán chūxiàn yǔ quánqiú biànnuǎn mìqiē xiāngguān.
english: The frequent occurrence of extreme weather events is closely related to global warming.
usage_context: Discussing the connection between extreme weather and climate change

chinese: 感谢您百忙之中抽出时间接待我。
pinyin: gǎnxiè nín bǎi máng zhī zhōng chōu chū shíjiān jiēdài wǒ.
english: Thank you for taking the time to receive me despite your busy schedule.
usage_context: Formally thanking someone for making time to meet

chinese: 批判性思维是现代教育不可或缺的核心素养。
pinyin: pīpànxìng sīwéi shì xiàndài jiàoyù bùkě huòquē de héxīn sùyǎng.
english: Critical thinking is an indispensable core competency in modern education.
usage_context: Discussing the importance of critical thinking in education

chinese: 这个品牌在国际市场上享有很高的声誉。
pinyin: zhège pǐnpái zài guójì shìchǎng shàng xiǎngyǒu hěn gāo de shēngyù.
english: This brand enjoys a very high reputation in the international market.
usage_context: Describing a well-regarded brand in global markets

chinese: 跨文化交流有助于增进不同民族之间的相互了解。
pinyin: kuà wénhuà jiāoliú yǒu zhù yú zēngjìn bùtóng mínzú zhī jiān de xiānghù liǎojiě.
english: Cross-cultural exchange helps promote mutual understanding between different peoples.
usage_context: Discussing the benefits of international travel and cultural exchange

chinese: 这次合作对双方而言都是互利共赢的。
pinyin: zhè cì hézuò duì shuāngfāng ér yán dōu shì hùlì gòng yíng de.
english: This cooperation is mutually beneficial and a win-win for both parties.
usage_context: Describing a mutually beneficial business partnership

chinese: 定期进行体检是预防疾病的有效手段。
pinyin: dìngqī jìnxíng tǐjiǎn shì yùfáng jíbìng de yǒuxiào shǒuduàn.
english: Regular physical examinations are an effective means of disease prevention.
usage_context: Recommending regular health checkups

chinese: 孝顺父母是中华民族的传统美德。
pinyin: xiàoshùn fùmǔ shì Zhōnghuá mínzú de chuántǒng měidé.
english: Filial piety toward one's parents is a traditional virtue of the Chinese nation.
usage_context: Discussing the Confucian value of filial piety

chinese: 知识的积累需要长年的坚持与努力。
pinyin: zhīshi de jīlěi xūyào cháng nián de jiānchí yǔ nǔlì.
english: The accumulation of knowledge requires years of persistence and effort.
usage_context: Motivating students to commit to long-term learning

chinese: 请沿着这条干线一直往北走，大约二十分钟就到了。
pinyin: qǐng yán zhe zhè tiáo gànxiàn yīzhí wǎng běi zǒu, dàyuē èrshí fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
english: Please go north along this main road, and you'll arrive in about twenty minutes.
usage_context: Giving detailed directions along a main road

pinyin: shīlǐ le, wǒ yào xiān gàocí.
english: Excuse my rudeness, I must take my leave first.
usage_context: Formally excusing yourself from a gathering or meeting
